Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1B27 "BISMARCK-1B27" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Bismarck.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Used the Datasoft disk release because it has a loading screen and is not frozen like the tape dump (Trilogic).
